# A309370 a(15) >= 364: Sidon set in {0,1}^15, integer componentwise addition.
# 364 vectors, one per line (bit position 0 first). no value recorded on OEIS for this n.
# Independently re-verified: all C(364,2)+364 pairwise sums distinct.
